docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDERS, BARKLEE AS TO DEFENDANT OJEDA, ADRIANA
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO NOV-8-2019 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPT. 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-13-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BARKLEE SANDERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADRIANA OJEDA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-08-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $119.99 FILED BY SANDERS, BARKLEE AS TO DEFENDANT OJEDA, ADRIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
